title: Implement Debounce
input_format: A function `fn` and a delay in milliseconds `delay`
output_format: A debounced version of the function that delays invoking `fn` until after `delay` ms have elapsed since the last invocation
example_output: A function that only calls fn after 300ms of inactivity
constraints: 0 <= delay <= 10000, fn is a valid function
function_signature: function debounce(fn: (...args: any[]) => void, delay: number): (...args: any[]) => void {}
